requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing to GCC GSO / ETSI Standards (TRA Oman Type Approval Requirement)
requirement_topic.zh: GCC GSO / ETSI标准的EMC测试（TRA Oman型号认证要求）
requirement_topic.zht: GCC GSO / ETSI標準的EMC測試（TRA Oman型號認證要求）

summary.en: TRA Oman type approval requires EMC test reports from an accredited laboratory demonstrating conformance with GCC GSO or ETSI EMC standards applicable to the device category. Oman, as a GCC member state, adopts GCC GSO technical standards that are substantially aligned with ETSI EN 301 489 series for radio equipment EMC. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, ETSI EN 301 489-1 (common EMC requirements) and ETSI EN 301 489-17 (wideband data/WLAN/BT) are primary references. For LoRa/SRD and cellular, the corresponding ETSI EN 301 489 sub-parts apply. EMC test evidence is submitted as part of the TRA Oman type approval application dossier. Chinese GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625) are not accepted by TRA Oman.
summary.zh: TRA Oman型号认证要求提供由经认可实验室出具的EMC测试报告，证明符合适用于该设备类别的GCC GSO或ETSI EMC标准。阿曼作为GCC成员国，采用与ETSI EN 301 489系列高度一致的GCC GSO技术标准作为无线设备EMC要求。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，主要参考标准为ETSI EN 301 489-1（通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（宽带数据/WLAN/BT）。LoRa/SRD和蜂窝设备则适用相应的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。EMC测试证据作为TRA Oman型号认证申请文件的一部分提交。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被TRA Oman接受。
summary.zht: TRA Oman型號認證要求提供由經認可實驗室出具的EMC測試報告，證明符合適用於該設備類別的GCC GSO或ETSI EMC標準。阿曼作為GCC成員國，採用與ETSI EN 301 489系列高度一致的GCC GSO技術標準作為無線設備EMC要求。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，主要參考標準為ETSI EN 301 489-1（通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（寬頻資料/WLAN/BT）。LoRa/SRD和蜂窩設備則適用相應的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。EMC測試證據作為TRA Oman型號認證申請文件的一部分提交。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被TRA Oman接受。

standards_or_laws: GCC GSO technical standards (EMC series, aligned with ETSI EN 301 489)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (EMC for wideband data and HIPERLAN)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and radio equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions for ISM/IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). SRRC type approval includes radio parameter measurements but does not encompass the full ETSI EN 301 489 EMC test scope. CCC certification covers EMC under GB/T 9254 for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及无线电设备的EMC合规依据GB/T 9254（ISM/IT设备的传导和辐射发射）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）执行。SRRC型号认证包含无线电参数测量，但不涵盖完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC测试范围。CCC认证对列入目录的产品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及無線電設備的EMC合規依據GB/T 9254（ISM/IT設備的傳導和輻射發射）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）執行。SRRC型號認證包含無線電參數測量，但不涵蓋完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC測試範圍。CCC認證對列入目錄的產品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (radio parameter testing, not full EMC)

gap.en: TRA Oman requires EMC evidence to GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489 series standards, which differ in test methods, limits, and frequency ranges from Chinese GB/T 9254. A new EMC test campaign at a TRA Oman-accepted accredited laboratory is required. Existing SRRC and CCC EMC reports to GB standards cannot be reused. The GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489 framework also covers immunity testing (IEC 61000-4 series) which is outside the SRRC scope.
gap.zh: TRA Oman要求提供符合GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489系列标准的EMC证据，该系列在测试方法、限值和频率范围上均与中国GB/T 9254有所不同。须在TRA Oman认可的经认可实验室进行新的EMC测试。现有的依据GB标准出具的SRRC和CCC EMC报告不能用于TRA Oman。GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489框架还涵盖抗扰度测试（IEC 61000-4系列），该部分不在SRRC范围之内。
gap.zht: TRA Oman要求提供符合GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489系列標準的EMC證據，該系列在測試方法、限值和頻率範圍上均與中國GB/T 9254有所不同。須在TRA Oman認可的經認可實驗室進行新的EMC測試。現有的依據GB標準出具的SRRC和CCC EMC報告不能用於TRA Oman。GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489框架還涵蓋抗擾度測試（IEC 61000-4系列），該部分不在SRRC範圍之內。

source.publisher: TRA Oman — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing to GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489 series at a TRA Oman-accepted accredited laboratory is required as part of TRA Oman type approval. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC EMC test reports are not accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在TRA Oman认可的经认可实验室按GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489系列进行EMC测试，是TRA Oman型号认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC测试报告不被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在TRA Oman認可的經認可實驗室按GCC GSO / ETSI EN 301 489系列進行EMC測試，是TRA Oman型號認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC測試報告不被接受。

requirement_topic.en: GCC GSO Standards Framework — EMC and Radio Spectrum Harmonisation
requirement_topic.zh: GCC GSO标准框架 — EMC与无线频谱协调
requirement_topic.zht: GCC GSO標準框架 — EMC與無線頻譜協調

summary.en: Oman participates in the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) Standardisation Organisation (GSO) harmonised standards framework, which aligns Omani national standards with GCC regional technical requirements for radio equipment and EMC. Under this framework, 5 GHz WLAN devices must support Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS) and Transmit Power Control (TPC) as required by the GCC regional frequency plan. The GCC MRA facilitates type approval mutual recognition among GCC states (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE) but does not extend this recognition to non-GCC approvals. Importers should verify whether a product holding type approval from another GCC member state is automatically accepted under the MRA or requires a separate TRA Oman application.
summary.zh: 阿曼参与海湾合作委员会（GCC）标准化组织（GSO）协调标准框架，该框架将阿曼国家标准与GCC无线设备及EMC区域技术要求对齐。在此框架下，5 GHz WLAN设备须按GCC区域频率计划要求支持动态频率选择（DFS）和发射功率控制（TPC）。GCC MRA便利GCC成员国（巴林、科威特、阿曼、卡塔尔、沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋）之间的型号认证相互承认，但不将该承认延伸至非GCC批准。进口商应核验持有其他GCC成员国型号认证的产品是否可依据MRA在阿曼自动获得承认，或是否需要单独的TRA Oman申请。
summary.zht: 阿曼參與海灣合作委員會（GCC）標準化組織（GSO）協調標準框架，該框架將阿曼國家標準與GCC無線設備及EMC區域技術要求對齊。在此框架下，5 GHz WLAN設備須按GCC區域頻率計畫要求支援動態頻率選擇（DFS）和發射功率控制（TPC）。GCC MRA便利GCC成員國（巴林、科威特、阿曼、卡達、沙烏地阿拉伯、阿聯酋）之間的型號認證相互承認，但不將該承認延伸至非GCC批准。進口商應核驗持有其他GCC成員國型號認證的產品是否可依據MRA在阿曼自動獲得承認，或是否需要單獨的TRA Oman申請。

standards_or_laws: GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (MRA) for telecom/radio type approval
Oman National Frequency Spectrum Plan (TRA Oman)
ETSI EN 301 893 v2.1.1 (5 GHz WLAN — DFS/TPC requirements)

summary.en: China's 5 GHz WLAN frequency allocation and DFS requirements are set by MIIT and differ from the GCC regional plan. SRRC type approval for 5 GHz WLAN requires DFS functionality in China under MIIT Order No. 52 frequency rules, but the specific DFS channels and radar detection thresholds may differ from those mandated under the GCC regional spectrum plan. China is not a party to the GCC MRA.
summary.zh: 中国5 GHz WLAN频率划分及DFS要求由工信部制定，与GCC区域计划有所不同。SRRC对5 GHz WLAN的型号认证要求依据工信部第52号令频率规定在中国须具备DFS功能，但具体DFS信道和雷达检测门限可能与GCC区域频谱计划规定有所不同。中国不是GCC MRA的缔约方。
summary.zht: 中國5 GHz WLAN頻率劃分及DFS要求由工信部制定，與GCC區域計畫有所不同。SRRC對5 GHz WLAN的型號認證要求依據工信部第52號令頻率規定在中國須具備DFS功能，但具體DFS信道和雷達檢測門限可能與GCC區域頻譜計畫規定有所不同。中國不是GCC MRA的締約方。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Order No. 52 (5 GHz WLAN frequency allocation and DFS in China)
SRRC type approval for 5 GHz WLAN
GB/T 22450 series (WLAN technical standards in China)

gap.en: Chinese 5 GHz WLAN DFS channel configurations and radar detection parameters may not map directly onto Oman's GCC-aligned national spectrum plan. A product with SRRC 5 GHz WLAN approval must be re-verified against the GCC regional DFS requirements as part of the TRA Oman type approval. The GCC MRA is not applicable to Chinese-origin approvals; a new TRA Oman application is required regardless of any existing GCC state approvals the product may hold.
gap.zh: 中国5 GHz WLAN DFS信道配置和雷达检测参数可能无法直接映射到阿曼GCC协调国家频谱计划。持有SRRC 5 GHz WLAN批准的产品须在TRA Oman型号认证过程中依据GCC区域DFS要求重新核验。GCC MRA不适用于中国来源的批准；无论产品是否持有现有GCC成员国批准，均须重新提交TRA Oman申请。
gap.zht: 中國5 GHz WLAN DFS信道配置和雷達檢測參數可能無法直接映射到阿曼GCC協調國家頻譜計畫。持有SRRC 5 GHz WLAN批准的產品須在TRA Oman型號認證過程中依據GCC區域DFS要求重新核驗。GCC MRA不適用於中國來源的批准；無論產品是否持有現有GCC成員國批准，均須重新提交TRA Oman申請。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GCC GSO harmonised standards and the Oman National Frequency Spectrum Plan govern radio equipment EMC and spectrum use in Oman. 5 GHz DFS/TPC requirements under the GCC regional plan must be verified separately from Chinese SRRC approval. The GCC MRA does not extend to Chinese-origin approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GCC GSO协调标准和阿曼国家频率频谱计划管理阿曼无线设备EMC和频谱使用。GCC区域计划下的5 GHz DFS/TPC要求须独立于中国SRRC批准进行核验。GCC MRA不延伸至中国来源的批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GCC GSO協調標準和阿曼國家頻率頻譜計畫管理阿曼無線設備EMC和頻譜使用。GCC區域計畫下的5 GHz DFS/TPC要求須獨立於中國SRRC批准進行核驗。GCC MRA不延伸至中國來源的批准。
